basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Worker Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website wcd.odisha.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

qualification.details: Permanent resident of the area under the Anganwadi Centre. Age between 18 to 35 years. Minimum 12th pass (Higher Secondary). Knowledge of Odia mother tongue up to 7th class. Preference to widows, abandoned, and divorced women.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anganwadi Sahayika posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Anganwadi Sahayika posts is 17th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Anganwadi Sahayika post is a 12th pass (Higher Secondary) certificate.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 to 35 years as of January 1, 2019. Age relaxation may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Anganwadi Sahayika?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Anganwadi Sahayika post announced by the Women and Child Development Department.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Anganwadi Sahayika positions must be submitted online through the official portal provided by the department.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any preference given to certain categories of women?
faq.answer: Yes, preference is given to widows, orphans, and abandoned women for the Anganwadi Sahayika positions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Anganwadi Sahayika posts is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Do I need to know Odia to apply?
faq.answer: Yes, knowledge of Odia as a mother tongue up to the 7th class is a mandatory requirement for all applicants.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It contains detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for this recruitment is http://engagement-awc.odisha.gov.in, where you can find more details and the application portal.
